mentions.note: At 16-year high, raised guidance; winner, finally back; good technology and execution.
Has AI and 6G positioning; people who understand tech say buy it; Cramer relaying the smart call, not making his own deep dive.

Transformation into distributed AI infrastructure via edge computing, optical networking, and Nvidia partnership; AI/cloud segment growing 49%; already up 151% YTD and overbought—wait for pullback before adding.
